chart.title: Plastic waste generation
chart.subtitle: This measures total plastic waste generation prior to management and therefore does not represent the quantity of plastic at risk of polluting waterways, rivers and the ocean environment.

Plastic waste generation (tonnes, total).citationShort: – processed by Our World in Data
Plastic waste generation (tonnes, total).citationLong: – processed by Our World in Data. “Plastic waste generation (tonnes, total)” [dataset]. Jambeck et al. (2015) [original data].
